# Registration with a community-issued certificate

*Worked example for [the record location and data access write-up](../authorizing-access.md). The software statement here is self-signed with the key inside an X.509 certificate that Gamma's community CA issued to the app; trust comes from the chain to the CA anchor published in NPD. The certificate is real and chains to the CA in keys-and-trust-anchors.*

**UDAP software statement (x5c carries the cert chain)** (compact JWS, really signed):

```
..ZfkeXoieh_jOMZZPlVAIu5aXE8ryJUbRdIBYUKjUJqW9G--NBL460ixxTWlcGrCphd66hFFW3ucriuJJG-zPYLe9s65LinGYaKg0fmhAv2d6n5utJO3KH_qtwE52wZGJlKyEoAg60IpvKSv98nF6qnIOXfbKtWw-gRYxkkCQtNO1JgGDBP4r-FHBdFlsKiXXiQLOT9sm_PM7vPCHvxxbW-x-gr156E3jqafz07i4yIjA3nmmI83r-Alztvd1GlULTae-cOf-ovzqLC-Qws3TsCBQTLJQj5NqkTR1_4zEPLdkou__Wqmgd4m3yHvegJj1SsNvHweWIsTdYfcJ55XJwQ
```

Decoded header:

```json
{
  "alg": "RS256",
  "x5c": [
    "",
    ""
  ]
}
```

Decoded payload:

```json
{
  "client_name": "BP Buddy",
  "grant_types": [
    "client_credentials"
  ],
  "token_endpoint_auth_method": "private_key_jwt",
  "scope": "patient/Patient.rs patient/Observation.rs",
  "contacts": [
    "support@bpbuddy.example"
  ],
  "iss": "https://bpbuddy.example",
  "sub": "https://bpbuddy.example",
  "aud": "https://lakeside.example/oauth/register",
  "iat": 1781271953,
  "exp": 1781272253,
  "jti": "947bac8b-1d55-477d-bb4f-abb5d9a407ba"
}
```

The `x5c` header holds the DER-encoded app certificate and the community CA certificate; both appear in PEM form in [keys-and-trust-anchors](keys-and-trust-anchors.md). The app certificate's subjectAltName URI is `https://bpbuddy.example`, matching `iss` and `sub`.

---

**Request**

```http
POST https://lakeside.example/oauth/register HTTP/1.1
Host: lakeside.example
Content-Type: application/json
```

```json
{
  "software_statement": "eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsIng1YyI6WyJNSUlEWHpDQ0FrZWdBd0lCQWdJVWIv...",
  "udap": "1"
}
```

---

**Response — 201 Created**

```http
HTTP/1.1 201 Created
Content-Type: application/json
```

```json
{
  "client_id": "gamma-dh-bp-buddy-2e64",
  "grant_types": [
    "client_credentials"
  ],
  "token_endpoint_auth_method": "private_key_jwt"
}
```

*Generated 2026-06-12T13:45:53.000Z by `tools/artifact-generator` in this repository. Keys are throwaway examples; every signature verifies against the keys in [keys-and-trust-anchors](keys-and-trust-anchors.md).*
